data.body: AC amendment: Contract document must conform to check-contract-schemas.sh rules: (1) level-1 heading must start with '# Contract:' — use '# Contract: recipe-engine-adapter'; (2) must have '## Purpose' section with non-empty content; (3) since this contract defines JSON output format signals, it must include '## Signal Format' section and '### Canonical parsing prefix' subsection per DSO contract schema. Also: any path references to plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/rope-adapter.sh or recipe-executor.sh must have '# shim-exempt: <reason>' or '# portability-ok' annotations since those files do not exist when this contract is committed (Layer 1 before Layer 2 scripts).
